ShortDescription.Value: Improves traffic with faster Transit Boarding + Loading; optional Late solo passengers stop holding up transit.

Publish.LongDescription:
## Faster public transit boarding
YES - this mod still useful with patch (1.5.7-1.5.8). The game patch added a fallback so stuck transit can move after ~10 minutes.
Fast Boarding helps before that point by with improved boarding/loading speeds and ability to reduce late passengers that prevent transit from leaving stops.
- Improve traffic, increase transit usage, reduce bunching of transit vehicles, reduce car demand indirectly. - The larger your city, the more this mod will help.
- This build focuses on two behaviors: - **Adjustable stop tuning** for all transit, not just buses and trains. You choose the speed. - **Skip Late Passengers** (optional [x]) so tardy citizens can just miss a vehicle instead of holding it up (happens in vanilla now, frequently). - See **Notes** section for incompatible mods.
Tune boarding speeds for:
- Bus, Rail (train, tram, subway), Water (ship, ferry), Air - Higher values shorten dwell by increasing loading speed at the stop and adjusting the boarding-time estimate used by the game. - ✅ When **Skip Late Passengers** is enabled, late passengers who are *still not ready* after *departure time* can miss that vehicle instead of holding it up. - Simple Goal: don't wait on passengers who are still late or far away. The game then naturally reassigns them.
### Bonus Status report included - After the city runs a bit, check the Options menu to see current status. - *Skipped* number shows how many late solo passengers have been skipped today to not hold up transit. - Use [Stats to Log] button for more detailed data than what is in Options menu. - Example usage: Worst stop shows 10+ minutes, check it for traffic, bad placement, not enough vehicles, or replace the stop. - This is a one-shot button that does not run in the city per-frame, so no performance impact. - When checking things, I like to click the Stats button every ~20-30 min, then compare the report later to see where the worst stops are and more (Scene Explorer mod can help with this too). - Each time you enter the menu, it does a 1-time scan of current city info (never while running city).
### Notes - Important compatibility: conflicts possible with mods that change boarding behavior, like All-Aboard, so Only choose One. Some players report no issues with Smart Transportation + Fast boarding together. - This mod is intended to be a lighter, safer alternative than replacing the game's Transport system files approach. - This mod works nicely with `Public Works Plus` to solve many transit issues. - Group boarding is left to normal vanilla handling to avoid splitting groups (they are few compared to the many single travelers). - Save-game safe. Safe to remove anytime. - No Harmony patches; lightweight design for low overhead and negligible performance impact.
### Support and feedback - If mods make the game better, give it a Like. It's an easy way to show support for free mods :) - Feedback on: Github, Discord, etc., link icons on this page.
### Credits - River-Mochi_____mod author - Inspiration and thanks to bcallender's All Aboard mod and Wayze's old InstantBoarding. - yenyang_________testing and code feedback - Neco1996________testing - MayorCheeks_____testing - elGaucho87______thumbnail straightening
If you got this far, congrats, say hi, there is a senryu poem I wrote just for you in images. click Like button, it's hard, I know, and so tiny.
tags: boarding time, bus stop, slow transit, debunching, unbunching
Publish.ChangeLog: - add Italian and Polish - update all locale files to align with English - internal add more info for stats report + verbose logging
